title: Appendix #A-5 Cheque Return Reason Codes
body_text:
Appendix #A-5	Cheque Return Reason Codes
Table 1 ГўВҖВ“ Return Codes for Updated Return Upload File, Chargebacks and Edit Cheque Returns (pay/no pay decisions)
This table outlines the codes available for Edit Cheque Returns (pay/no pay decisions). Use these codes if you are updating your banking system to support a new return upload file.
Cheque Return Reason Code
Payments Canada Return Time Frame | Business Rules
901 ГўВҖВ“ Insufficient Funds
1 business day.
Cannot be used for bank draft/money order.
902 ГўВҖВ“ Cannot Trace
1 business day
903 ГўВҖВ“ Payment Stopped
1 business day.
Cannot be used for bank draft/money order.
904 ГўВҖВ“ Post Dated
Up to and including day prior to due date
905 ГўВҖВ“ Account Closed
1 business day
906 ГўВҖВ“ Account Transferred to You
1 business day
907 ГўВҖВ“ No Chequing Privilege
1 business day
908 ГўВҖВ“ Funds Not Cleared/Account Frozen
1 business day.
Cannot be used for bankВ draft/money order.
910 ГўВҖВ“ Drawer/Payee Deceased
1 business day
912 ГўВҖВ“ Refer to Maker
1 business day
961 ГўВҖВ“ Body And Figures Differ
1 business day.
Cannot be used where difference is $20 or less.
962 ГўВҖВ“ Forged Endorsement*
6 years from date cleared. Requires a declaration form.
963 ГўВҖВ“ Counterfeit Item
1 business day
964 ГўВҖВ“ Not for Us
1 business day
968 ГўВҖВ“ Item Incorrectly Amount Encoded/Cleared in Wrong Currency
90 calendar days from date cleared. Cannot be used where the difference is $20 or less. Certification isnГўВҖВҷt an option. The negotiating FI can re-clear the item even if it isnГўВҖВҷt certified.
970 ГўВҖВ“ Non-conforming Signature
1 business day
973 ГўВҖВ“ Signature(s) Unauthorized
1 business day
974 ГўВҖВ“ Duplicate Payment
90 calendar days from date cleared.
978 ГўВҖВ“ Not Eligible for Clearing (Telecheque)
90 calendar days from date cleared.
981 ГўВҖВ“ Material Alteration*
90 calendar days from date cleared. If returned within 1 business day, no declaration required; after 1 business day, requires a declaration form.
983 ГўВҖВ“ Bank Draft/Money Order Lost or Stolen prior to Issue
1 business day
984 ГўВҖВ“ Intended Payee not Paid
6 years from date cleared. Requires a declaration form.
985 ГўВҖВ“ Stale Dated
1 business day.
Cannot be used for bank draft/money order.
986 ГўВҖВ“ Wrong Interest Calculation
1 business day
987 ГўВҖВ“ Refused by Payor/Payee
1 business day
988 ГўВҖВ“ Missing Image or Image Not Usable
90 calendar days from date cleared.
989 ГўВҖВ“ MICR Mismatch
90 calendar days from date cleared.
990 ГўВҖВ“ ICP Item Unable to Process
1 business day
991 ГўВҖВ“ Unauthorized PAD
Use of code 991 ГўВҖВ“ Unauthorized PAD may require the payor to complete a Request for Reimbursement. See Payments Canada Rule H1, Section 20, for more details.
*Note:	Ask the intended Payee or customer (as appropriate) to sign the required declaration form. Retain the declaration form and a copy of the cheque for 12 months. This must be provided to the PayeeГўВҖВҷs financial institution upon request.
BC Financial Institutions
ГўВҖВ“ See the Account Transactions Part in The Guide for further information on establishing policies for handling unauthorized and fraudulent transactions.
Ontario Financial Institutions
ГўВҖВ“ See the Deposits and Withdrawals Part in The Guide (Ontario) for further information on establishing policies for handling unauthorized and fraudulent transactions.
Related Information
Statutory Declaration ГўВҖВ“ Intended Payee Not Paid,
Form 2518
Statutory Declaration ГўВҖВ“ Unauthorized Account Transactions,
Form 3757
(available to subscribers of the Operations Manual Program only)
Statutory Declaration ГўВҖВ“ Unauthorized Cheque Transactions,
Form 3759
(available to subscribers of the Operations Manual Program only)
Table 2 ГўВҖВ“ ORS Returned Item Research and Current Upload File Return Code Mapping
This table outlines the codes that are available for research on ORS. This table includes current and obsolete return codes. The obsolete return codes arenГўВҖВҷt available for new cheque returns. However, it is possible to research items previously returned in ORS using the old codes.

968 ГўВҖВ“ Item Incorrectly Amount Encoded/Cleared in Wrong Currency

970 ГўВҖВ“ Non-conforming Signature

974 ГўВҖВ“ Duplicate Payment
960 ГўВҖВ“ Member Stamp Required
978 ГўВҖВ“ Not Eligible for Clearing (Telecheque)
977 ГўВҖВ“ Other
978 ГўВҖВ“ Not Eligible for Clearing (Telecheque)
981 ГўВҖВ“ Material Alteration
981 ГўВҖВ“ Material Alteration
983 ГўВҖВ“ Bank Draft/Money Order Lost or Stolen Prior to Issue
983 ГўВҖВ“ Bank Draft/Money Order Lost or Stolen Prior to Issue
984 ГўВҖВ“ Intended Payee Not Paid
984 ГўВҖВ“ Intended Payee Not Paid
985 ГўВҖВ“ Stale Dated
985 ГўВҖВ“ Stale Dated
986 ГўВҖВ“ Wrong Interest Calculation
986 ГўВҖВ“ Wrong Interest Calculation
987 ГўВҖВ“ Refused by Payor/Payee
987 ГўВҖВ“ Refused by Payor/Payee
988 ГўВҖВ“ Missing Image or Image Not Usable
988 ГўВҖВ“ Missing Image or Image Not Usable
Return codes available for research on ORS
Current Upload File Return Code Mapping
989 ГўВҖВ“ MICR Mismatch
989 ГўВҖВ“ MICR Mismatch
990 ГўВҖВ“ ICP Item Unable to Process
990 ГўВҖВ“ ICP Item Unable to Process. For Central 1 use only.
For issues with clearing images, use code 988 ГўВҖВ“ Missing Image or Image not Usable.
915 ГўВҖВ“ No Agreement Existed
991 ГўВҖВ“ Unauthorized PAD
916 ГўВҖВ“ Not in Accordance with Agreement
917 ГўВҖВ“ Agreement Revoked
918 ГўВҖВ“ No Confirmation/Pre-Notification
919 ГўВҖВ“ Not in Accordance with Agreement
